SEARCH
Package org.javalabs.jpa

Class LiteEntityManagerFactory

java.lang.Object
org.javalabs.jpa.LiteEntityManagerFactory
All Implemented Interfaces:
jakarta.persistence.EntityManagerFactory, AutoCloseable
public class LiteEntityManagerFactory extends Object implements jakarta.persistence.EntityManagerFactory
JPA LiTE entity manager factory.

A conventional persistence.xml may have multiple persistence unit defined. An EntityManagerFactory represents a single persistence unit. If there are multiple units defined, then multiple EntityManagerFactorys will be created. One persistence unit represents a unique database schema.

A call to EntityManagerFactory.createEntityManager() will create new EntityManager instance. Thus there can be multiple EntityManagers created for a given persistence unit. The factory may maintain a pool of EntityManagers for better reusability.

Author:
Sudiptasish Chanda
